parameters.jsCode:
const body = $json.body || $json || {};
const limit = Math.min(Math.max(parseInt(body.limit || '100', 10) || 100, 1), 500);
const sql = `
SELECT
  c.chunk_key,
  c.authority_document_key,
  c.chunk_text,
  c.jurisdiction,
  c.industry,
  c.trade_type,
  c.topic_tags,
  c.obligation_type,
  c.risk_level,
  c.source_url,
  c.current_version,
  c.effective_from,
  c.effective_to,
  d.document_type,
  d.document_title,
  d.authority_name,
  d.official_source,
  d.sme_interpretation_status
FROM authority_document_chunks c
JOIN authority_documents d ON d.authority_document_key = c.authority_document_key
WHERE d.status = 'active'
ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC, c.chunk_order
LIMIT ${limit};
`;
return [{ json: { sql } }];
